_about: Synthetic but realistic QA / Quality Assurance JD pool for India biopharma/pharma in mid-2026. 10 jobs across Bangalore, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Pune, Remote India. Salaries in INR LPA. Use for offline dry-runs when no JSearch key is configured.

data.job_description: Senior Executive role in QA supporting biologics manufacturing. Own batch record review (BPR / EBR), deviation handling, change control, CAPA closure, and product release as per cGMP. Drive Veeva QualityDocs and QualityOne workflows for SOP lifecycle, controlled document management, training assignment. Author/review validation protocols (CSV, equipment, cleaning, process). Lead audit readiness for USFDA, EMA, MHRA, ANVISA inspections. Strong knowledge of 21 CFR Part 11, ICH Q7/Q9/Q10, EU GMP Annex 1. SAP ERP for material disposition. 4-7 years biopharma QA experience required.

QA Specialist for CRO supporting global sponsors. Own Veeva Vault QualityDocs lifecycle, periodic review, change control, document retirement. Maintain audit trail integrity, ALCOA+ data integrity principles. Manage internal/external audit logistics; serve as document custodian during USFDA, MHRA, PMDA inspections. Author and revise SOPs, protocols, validation master plans. Coordinate with QC, manufacturing, regulatory affairs. Strong English writing required. cGMP, GLP, GDP background. 5-8 years pharma documentation/QA experience.

Assistant Manager QA for sterile injectables site. Lead deviation investigations, root cause analysis (5-Why, Fishbone), CAPA effectiveness verification, change control. Drive QMS metrics (deviation aging, CAPA on-time closure, complaint trend). Author APR / PQR reports. Audit readiness owner: host USFDA, MHRA, WHO PQ, ANVISA, EU GMP inspections; close inspection observations within SLA. Strong knowledge of 21 CFR 210/211, ICH Q7/Q9/Q10, EU GMP. Use of TrackWise / Veeva for QMS. 7-10 years pharma QA leadership.

QA Executive owning stability program for OSD and injectable products. Author and review stability protocols per ICH Q1A(R2), Q1B, Q1E. Manage stability sample pull schedule, chamber qualification, OOS / OOT investigations. Cross-functional with QC, formulation, regulatory affairs for stability data submissions. Method validation review (ICH Q2(R1)). Veeva and SAP QM exposure. 3-5 years pharma QA / stability experience.

QA Officer for finished dosage form release. Review BMR / BPR / executed batch records for cGMP compliance, completeness, calculation accuracy. Deviation review, change control assessment, vendor qualification, raw material disposition in SAP. Annual product review authoring. Knowledge of US, EU, ROW market regulations. Audit support during USFDA, MHRA, WHO. 2-4 years pharma QA experience.

Senior QA Specialist - Digital QMS & Veeva. Drive global rollout of Veeva Vault QMS, QualityDocs, Training. Configure workflows, lifecycle states, security roles. Partner with IT for CSV (computer system validation) per GAMP 5, 21 CFR Part 11. Bridge between business QA and technology teams. Train end-users, manage cutover for legacy QMS migrations from TrackWise. 6-9 years experience with QMS implementations in pharma.

QA Manager owning site quality system. Lead a team of 8 across batch release, documentation, validation, audit. Drive APR / PQR, management review, regulatory commitments closure. Inspection lead during USFDA, EU GMP, MHRA, COFEPRIS audits. Mentor team in CAPA, deviation, change control investigations. Strong QMS depth (TrackWise, Veeva, Caliber LIMS). 10+ years pharma QA, 3+ in leadership.

QA Executive interfacing with microbiology QC. Review microbial limit test, sterility, bioburden, endotoxin LAL, environmental monitoring data. Trend EM excursions, drive CAPA on Class 5/7 cleanroom deviations. Author SOPs covering aseptic technique, gowning, media fill qualification. Veeva docs, SAP. Strong microbiology + QA hybrid background preferred. 4-6 years experience.

Quality Compliance role driving regulatory commitments tracking, market complaints investigation, recall management. Data integrity audits per ALCOA+, 21 CFR Part 11. Liaison with regulatory affairs for CMC sections, post-approval changes. Inspection observation closure within agreed SLA. cGMP, ICH Q7/Q9/Q10. Veeva and TrackWise exposure. 5-7 years pharma compliance experience.

Remote QA Specialist for global CRO supporting clinical trial sponsors. GxP audit execution (GCP, GLP, GMP audits at sponsor sites and vendors). Veeva Vault eTMF document QC review, audit trail review. Drive vendor qualification, oversight, periodic audits. Quality issue management in TrackWise / Veeva QMS. ICH GCP E6(R2), 21 CFR Part 11 expertise. Travel up to 25%. 5-8 years GxP QA experience.
